# Web Quality Gates

A launch-oriented workflow must pass, waive with rationale, or halt on these gates:

- Product scope and acceptance criteria
- Information architecture and content model
- UX/UI design system and responsive behavior
- Frontend/backend integration
- Web security and SecOps
- Accessibility and SEO
- Performance budgets and Core Web Vitals
- Browser/device QA
- Release, deployment, rollback, and post-release validation
- Observability, alerting, ownership, and maintenance/growth loop
